WITH SegmentMinConsumption AS (
    SELECT 
        c.Segment,
        MIN(y.Consumption) AS MinConsumption
    FROM 
        yearmonth y
    JOIN 
        customers c ON y.CustomerID = c.CustomerID
    WHERE 
        y.Date BETWEEN '201301' AND '201312'
    GROUP BY 
        c.Segment
),
SegmentLowestConsumers AS (
    SELECT 
        y.CustomerID,
        c.Segment,
        y.Consumption
    FROM 
        yearmonth y
    JOIN 
        customers c ON y.CustomerID = c.CustomerID
    WHERE 
        y.Date BETWEEN '201301' AND '201312'
        AND (c.Segment, y.Consumption) IN (
            SELECT 
                Segment, MinConsumption
            FROM 
                SegmentMinConsumption
        )
),
SegmentAnnualAverages AS (
    SELECT 
        Segment,
        SUM(Consumption) / COUNT(*) AS AnnualAverage
    FROM 
        SegmentLowestConsumers
    GROUP BY 
        Segment
)
SELECT 
    (SELECT AnnualAverage FROM SegmentAnnualAverages WHERE Segment = 'SME') - (SELECT AnnualAverage FROM SegmentAnnualAverages WHERE Segment = 'LAM') AS SME_LAM_Difference,
    (SELECT AnnualAverage FROM SegmentAnnualAverages WHERE Segment = 'LAM') - (SELECT AnnualAverage FROM SegmentAnnualAverages WHERE Segment = 'KAM') AS LAM_KAM_Difference,
    (SELECT AnnualAverage FROM SegmentAnnualAverages WHERE Segment = 'KAM') - (SELECT AnnualAverage FROM SegmentAnnualAverages WHERE Segment = 'SME') AS KAM_SME_Difference;	----- bird -----	debit_card_specializing

WITH customer_id AS (
    SELECT link_to_member
    FROM expense
    WHERE cost = 634.8 AND expense_date = '2012-08-25'
),
2012_consumption AS (
    SELECT SUM(cost) AS total_2012
    FROM expense
    WHERE link_to_member IN (SELECT link_to_member FROM customer_id)
    AND expense_date BETWEEN '2012-01-01' AND '2012-12-31'
),
2013_consumption AS (
    SELECT SUM(cost) AS total_2013
    FROM expense
    WHERE link_to_member IN (SELECT link_to_member FROM customer_id)
    AND expense_date BETWEEN '2013-01-01' AND '2013-12-31'
)
SELECT 
    (total_2012 - total_2013) / total_2012 AS consumption_decrease_rate
FROM 
    2012_consumption, 
    2013_consumption;	----- bird -----	debit_card_specializing
